name: Sweet-Sour Franks
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Hot dogs, or cocktail franks
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients in a removable liner.
2. Mix well to break up jelly chunks.
3. Place the liner in the base of the slow cooker.
4. Cook on high for 15 to 20 minutes to soften the jelly and blend the sauce ingredients.
5. Cut the hot dogs into bite-size pieces and add them to the slow cooker.
6. Add the pineapple.
7. Cover and cook on high for 2 hours, or low for 4 hours.
8. Set the control to low to maintain temperature while serving.
